summary: Vertical video. Fox News 'Hannity' interview clip of FBI Director Kash Patel discussing the extradition of a Tren de Aragua leader and counterterrorism arrests. The footage is a single talking shot with chyrons and no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Hannity; TREN DE ARAGUA LEADER EXTRADITED TO THE U.S. TO FACE TERRORISM, INTERNATIONAL DRUG CHARGES
